ddls:
CREATE TABLE "garment_types" (
  "garment_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garment type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the garment type (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the garment type */,
  "description_fr" TEXT /* Description of the garment type in French */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the garment type */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the garment type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("garment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garment_brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garment brand */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the garment brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the garment brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garment_styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garment style */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the garment style */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the garment style */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "garment_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment type the size chart belongs to */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand the size chart belongs to */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* ID of the style the size chart belongs to */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the garment (e.g., 2, 4, 6) */,
  "stature_cm" TEXT /* Stature measurement in cm for the size */,
  "waist_cm" TEXT /* Waist measurement in cm for the size */,
  "hips_cm" TEXT /* Hips measurement in cm for the size */,
  "stature_in" TEXT /* Stature measurement in inches for the size */,
  "waist_in" TEXT /* Waist measurement in inches for the size */,
  "hips_in" TEXT /* Hips measurement in inches for the size */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Measurement unit for the size chart (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  "bust_cm" TEXT /* Bust measurement in cm for the size */,
  "bust_in" TEXT /* Bust measurement in inches for the size */,
  "inseam_cm" TEXT /* Inseam measurement in cm for the size */,
  "inseam_in" TEXT /* Inseam measurement in inches for the size */,
  "size_range" TEXT /* Size range for the size chart (e.g., 2-4, 6-8) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the size chart was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the size chart was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_garment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_type_id") REFERENCES garment_types ("garment_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES garment_brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES garment_styles ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement unit */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Name of the measurement unit (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement unit */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor to convert between units */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, editor, viewer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_chart_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart the version belongs to */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the size chart was changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_versions_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_versions_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the size chart */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the size chart was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who accessed the size chart */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (browser and device information) of the user who accessed the size chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_chart_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart being tracked */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views for the size chart */,
  "edit_count" INTEGER /* Number of edits for the size chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_analytics_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
